Uses of Class
dyntabs.ai.ConversationBuilder

Packages that use ConversationBuilder
Package
Description
dyntabs.ai
 

  • Uses of ConversationBuilder in dyntabs.ai

    Methods in dyntabs.ai that return ConversationBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ConversationBuilder
    EasyAI.chat()
    Starts building a new Conversation for simple chat.
    ConversationBuilder
    ConversationBuilder.withApiKey(String apiKey)
    Overrides the API key from configuration.
    ConversationBuilder
    ConversationBuilder.withBaseUrl(String baseUrl)
    Overrides the API base URL.
    ConversationBuilder
    ConversationBuilder.withChatLanguageModel(dev.langchain4j.model.chat.ChatLanguageModel model)
    Injects an externally created ChatLanguageModel.
    ConversationBuilder
    ConversationBuilder.withMaxTokens(int maxTokens)
    Limits the maximum number of tokens in the AI response.
    ConversationBuilder
    ConversationBuilder.withMemory(int maxMessages)
    Enables conversation memory.
    ConversationBuilder
    ConversationBuilder.withModel(String modelName)
    Overrides the model name from configuration.
    ConversationBuilder
    ConversationBuilder.withProvider(String provider)
    Overrides the AI provider.
    ConversationBuilder
    ConversationBuilder.withSystemMessage(String systemMessage)
    Sets a system message that defines the AI's behavior and personality.
    ConversationBuilder
    ConversationBuilder.withTemperature(double temperature)
    Sets the temperature (creativity) of the AI responses.
